LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT TREATS THIS MOTION AS A DEMURRER. THE COURT SUSTAINS THIS DEMURRER WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST STATE WHAT CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ALLEGED AGAINST WHICH DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHETHER ANY ALLEGED CONTRACT WAS WRITTEN, ORAL, OR IMPLIED BY CONDUCT, ATTACH A COPY OF THE AGREEMENT TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, OR SET OUT THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT IN THE BODY OF THE COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-04-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-30-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Set For Trial On Apr-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS LUIS A. GUERRA, KIMBERLY H. SCHULTZ'S MOTION TO DISMISS. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the court treats this motion as a demurrer. The court sustains this demurrer with 10 days leave to amend as to all causes of action. Plaintiff must state what causes of action are alleged against which defendant. Plaintiff must plead whether any alleged contract was written, oral, or implied by conduct, attach a copy of the agreement to the amended complaint, or set out the terms of the contract in the body of the complaint. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
